summary: coder v7 closes tester v5 F1 — the only finding. Added Scenario4_PersistedGrantReVerified_NonceReplayDoesNotReprompt verbatim from v5's spec (test-only change, no production edit). Clean rebuild: C# 2855/2855, PLang 203/203, 0 fail, 0 skip. Mutation-verified: SkipFreshnessCheck true->false now produces TWO independent Scenario4 failures — _WireFreshnessWindow on secondRead (step 2, wire-freshness) and the new test on read2 (step 4, nonce-replay). Each half of the F-A fix is now its own regression gate, which is exactly what v5 said was missing. Production code restored, suite re-confirmed green.
